description: Counterpart of the exam-style case agents-exam/compound-weather-and-support-assistant.json (parts: weather {wf, false}; assistant {agent, false|true}). Multi-artifact probe: the agent must treat the request as two independent automations and route each correctly — one workflow build, one agent-builder creation. Tranche 2 — calibrated at N=3 (2026-07-08).

conversation.text: 1) Every weekday at 9am, Slack me the Berlin weather. 2) Create a support assistant that chats with customers and decides when to escalate.

text: [If the agent asks whether to do both or which to do first, say: yes, both, in whatever order.
If it asks any other clarifying question, give a minimal plausible answer (e.g. escalations go to support@acme.test).
Approve any reasonable plan or setup card. End the conversation once both automations have been created or the agent has clearly finished.]

processExpectations: The agent treats the request as two independent automations with separate lifecycles rather than merging them into a single artifact.
The weather notification is built as a scheduled workflow via the workflow-building tools.
The support assistant is created via the agent-builder path (agent_builder / create_agent tools), not as a second workflow.
The agent calls the load_skill tool with the intent-recognition skill before deciding what to build.
